_note: Mailchimp Customer Journey reference file. Use the data below when building your automation in Mailchimp: Automations → Customer Journeys → Create Journey.
trigger: Missed call detected by phone system

emails.subject_line: We just missed your call — Bayview Village Dental
emails.preview_text: We saw your call come in and we're sorry we missed you — we were most likely with another patient.
emails.body_plain_text:
Hi [PatientFirstName],

We saw your call come in and we're sorry we missed you — we were most likely with another patient.

We'll call you back as soon as we're free, usually within the hour. If you'd rather not wait, you can book directly at [BookingLink] — it only takes a minute.

Talk soon,
The Bayview Village Dental Team
[ClinicPhone]

emails.subject_line: Still hoping to connect — Bayview Village Dental
emails.preview_text: We tried to get back to you but may have missed you again. We haven't forgotten.
emails.body_plain_text:
Hi [PatientFirstName],

We tried to get back to you but may have missed you again. We haven't forgotten.

Whenever it's convenient, give us a call at [ClinicPhone] or book a time that works for you directly at [BookingLink] — no hold times, no phone tag.

The Bayview Village Dental Team

emails.subject_line: One last try from Bayview Village Dental
emails.preview_text: We wanted to reach out one more time. If you're still looking for a dentist in Toronto, we'd genuinely love to help.
emails.body_plain_text:
Hi [PatientFirstName],

We wanted to reach out one more time. If you're still looking for a dentist in Toronto, we'd genuinely love to help.

Call us at [ClinicPhone] whenever you're ready, or book at [BookingLink]. No pressure either way.

Warmly,
The Bayview Village Dental Team
